instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL REDESIGN: Discard the old dark navy/obsidian design entirely. DO NOT use neon glows, ember particles, glass blur, or heavy dark gradients.

AESTHETIC: Aim for an 'Old Money Tech' / Premium SaaS aesthetic. Think Stripe meets high-end architectural firm. The design must project 'data serenity'—minimalist, authoritative, and extremely clear.
TECH STACK: Use standard React (.js, NOT .tsx) with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI. All components must be written in pure JavaScript.
BRAND INTEGRATION: The SaniXperts logo is an electric-blue mark with chrome wordmark. Use the provided 'Royal Blue' solely as a sharp, deliberate accent against expansive white/alabaster space.
TESTING: Every interactive element MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case based on its role (e.g., 'sign-in-submit-btn').
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Never center-align the app container (no .App { text-align: center; }).
Avoid the 'AI slop' look: do not use basic equal-square grids everywhere, do not use universal 'transition: all'.
Create depth using z-index hierarchy and layered ambient shadows, not heavy drop shadows.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical defaults. Cramped designs look cheap.
Never use purely transparent backgrounds on floating elements; always use solid pure white with a crisp border.
Never use placeholder AI emojis for icons. Use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react.

typography.system: The Anti-Default Rule: DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk.

headings.description: Architectural, striking, bold. Used for page titles, major metrics, and the sign-in hero.

body.description: Clean, highly legible geometric sans for data tables, UI controls, and text.

mono_data.description: For exact time stamps (07:00-15:00), exact currency, and device IDs.

colors.strategy: Apply colors via Tailwind arbitrary values or configure in tailwind.config.js. Rely on 90% monochrome (white/alabaster/obsidian) with 10% electric blue for primary CTAs and active states.

visual_enhancers.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use 1px solid borders (border-slate-200) extensively on cards, table rows, and input fields to create a crisp, technical feel.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Zero heavy shadows. Use soft ambient depth: shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)] on hover or floating panels.
visual_enhancers.radius: Micro-rounding. Use rounded-md (6px) or rounded-lg (8px) for cards and inputs. Do not use fully pill-shaped extreme rounding except for status pills.
visual_enhancers.textures: Include a subtle noise overlay (mix-blend-multiply, opacity 2%) over the sign-in background to kill digital flatness.

components.buttons: Solid primary brand color (#0044FF) with pure white text. Hover state translates Y-axis by -2px with a soft shadow. No gradient backgrounds.
components.cards: Pure white background, 1px slate-200 border, no default shadow. Padding MUST be generous (p-6 or p-8).
components.inputs: Height h-12. White bg, slate-200 border. On focus: ring-2 ring-brand-primary/20 border-brand-primary.
components.status_pills: Small (text-xs), uppercase tracking-wider, pill-shaped (rounded-full), soft background with bold colored text (e.g., Emerald text on light Mint bg).
components.bottom_sheets: For mobile PWA. Must slide up smoothly. White surface, rounded-t-2xl, with a 4px high, 40px wide drag handle (bg-slate-200) at the top.
components.live_clock: Remove the old serif clock. Use Cabinet Grotesk or JetBrains Mono, extreme size (text-5xl or 6xl), tracking-tighter, in Obsidian color. Pure data serenity.

grids_and_layouts.spacing: Extremely generous. Use gap-8 or gap-12 between dashboard sections.
grids_and_layouts.dashboard_grid: Bento-style layout. High density but clearly separated by 1px borders. Top row for KPI summary (col-span-1 each), Main middle for charts (col-span-2 or 3), right column for live feeds/activity.
grids_and_layouts.sign_in_page: Split screen or centered floating architectural card. If split, left side pure white with form, right side edge-to-edge abstract elegant architecture image.

motion.philosophy: Restrained and elegant. No bouncy effects. No particles.
motion.entrances: Staggered fade-up. Use Framer Motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4, ease: [0.23, 1, 0.32, 1] }}.
motion.hovers: Subtle border color shift (slate-200 to slate-300) and minor lift (-translate-y-1) for interactive cards. Duration 200ms ease-out.
motion.progress_indicators: Smooth width transitions for the shift progress bar. Use a solid electric blue fill inside a very light gray track.

media.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (Regular or Light weight) or Lucide React. Strict 24px bounding box, stroke-width 1.5. No solid icons unless active.
media.avatars: Sharp, high-quality photography. Give avatars a 1px border-white to separate them in overlapping stacks.

sign_in_background.description: Elegant abstract white wavy texture. Use this for the background of the sign-in page to give an ultra-premium, architectural feel.

marketing_accent.description: Clear glass building interior. Can be used in a split-screen sign in layout or inside the self-service portal header.

key_functionalities_implementation.sign_in: Pure white card centered on the abstract white texture background. Include an 'encrypted-session' trust cue (small lock icon + '256-bit Secure Session' text in slate-500) below the login button.
key_functionalities_implementation.live_facility_clock: Rendered in massive Cabinet Grotesk. The three shifts (Day, Afternoon, Night) displayed as crisp horizontal segments. The active shift gets a solid '#0044FF' top border and bold text, while inactive are muted slate-400.
key_functionalities_implementation.admin_dashboard: Left sidebar (w-64) pure white with border-r. Active nav item has a subtle blue background and bold blue text. Avatar table includes clear status pills (Emerald for 'Present', Crimson for 'Absent').
key_functionalities_implementation.employee_portal: Mobile-first. Use bottom sheets for 'Request Punch Correction'. Daily attendance shown as bento-style cards with bold typography for hours worked.
